en: But I know later I'm bound to change my mind
ko: 하지만 나중에 마음이 바뀔 거라는 걸 알아.

en: Depending on the weather I'm going
And hell, baby, nobody knows when
Yeah, if it was a different time
Might've been different in a different life
Maybe that plane wouldn't ever take off
ko: 아마 그 비행기는 결코 이륙하지 않을 거야.

en: Maybe that dust wouldn't fly off the drive
ko: 아마 그 먼지는 도로에서 날아가지 않을 거야.
매일 다른 일출을 떠나지 않을 거야.

en: Maybe I'd settle down, dig in some roots
Find me a farmhouse, find me you
Maybe I wouldn't be already gone again
If it weren't for the wind
I wouldn't stay wondering what's out there
ko: 밖에 무엇이 있는지 궁금해하지 않을 거야.

en: I wouldn't saddle up on the bridge
I wouldn't disappear out of thin air
I could put down these wings
ko: 이 날개를 내려놓을 수 있을 거야.
